steps.title: Analyze the amplicons by electrophoresis in...
steps.instruction: Analyze the amplicons by electrophoresis in 1X Tris-acetate-EDTA on a 1.0% agarose gel and visualize imagen under UV light after staining with 2 mg.ml-1 ethidium bromide.
